completed_work: Updated self-model tests for the new warrant and admitted plan state.
key_decisions: PLAN-20260706-0001 is now admitted for implementation by WARR-20260706-0001.
The admission scope remains diagnostic-only and read-only.
next_actions: Implement context-manifest-connected L0 candidate diagnostics under WARR-20260706-0001.
risks: Implementation must not drift from diagnostic-only behavior into provider prompt or context selection behavior.
summary_text: WARR-20260706-0001 was added and committed in 50b4df0 to admit PLAN-20260706-0001 for implementation. The warrant is scoped only to read-only context-manifest-connected L0 candidate diagnostics. It preserves the PLAN constraints: no provider prompt changes, no context selection changes, and no automatic L0 retrieval behavior. SELF_MODEL.json now reports warrant_counts.supported = 3 and admitted_plans = [PLAN-20260705-0001, PLAN-20260706-0001]. Post-commit audit after 50b4df0 returned ok true and content current.
